name: Chanukah Candle Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the egg whites through a coarse sieve and spread them solidly on a large flat platter as the background.
2. Lengthwise across the center of the platter, place 3 asparagus ends end to end.
3. Using this as a base, place 8 asparagus vertically to represent the 8 candles.
4. To form the base of the Menorah, place two half pieces of asparagus side by side vertically and one asparagus horizontally underneath them in the center.
5. Mash the egg yolks with butter or mayonnaise and form them into tiny balls, with a point at one end to represent the tip of the flame.
6. Sprinkle paprika around the 8 asparagus candles.
7. Use the remainder of the yolks alternately with olives to form a frame around the edge of the platter.
